title: π0.5: A VLA with Open-World Generalization
title_zh: π0.5：具备开放世界泛化能力的视觉-语言-动作模型
abstract: π0.5 is a vision-language-action (VLA) model that extends π0 with open-world generalization. By co-training on heterogeneous data sources — including multimodal web data, cross-embodiment robot data, multi-environment data, and mobile manipulation demonstrations — π0.5 enables a mobile manipulator to perform complex long-horizon cleaning tasks in entirely new kitchens and bedrooms never seen during training. The model uses a chain-of-thought inference procedure where the same VLA first produces high-level semantic actions in text, then outputs low-level motor commands via flow matching. In evaluations, π0.5 achieves 83% in-distribution success rate and 94% out-of-distribution success and language-following rates. Ablation studies demonstrate that all data mixture components contribute significantly, with web data being critical for OOD object recognition and multi-environment/cross-embodiment data essential for physical skill transfer. Scaling experiments show that with approximately 100 distinct training environments, π0.5 approaches the performance of a model directly trained on test environments.

editorial.selection_reason: π0.5 是 Physical Intelligence 在 π0 基础上的重要迭代，首次展示了 VLA 模型在完全未见过的家庭环境中执行长序列清洁任务的开放世界泛化能力，OOD 成功率 94%。其异构数据联合训练方案为 VLA 泛化提供了可复现的配方。
